# Contributor License Agreement

Thank you for contributing to the Chipzen SDK. To keep the licensing
of this project clean and to give downstream users confidence, we ask
every contributor to agree to the terms below before we merge their
first contribution.

This CLA is based on the standard
[Apache Software Foundation Individual Contributor License Agreement](https://www.apache.org/licenses/icla.pdf),
adapted for this project. If anything below is unclear, email
`legal@chipzen.ai` and we will happily explain or amend.

## You agree, by signing below, that:

1. **Your contributions are your own.** The contribution is original
   to you, or you have the right to submit it under the open-source
   license that covers this project (Apache License, Version 2.0).

2. **You grant Chipzen a license.** You grant Chipzen a perpetual,
   worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable
   copyright license to reproduce, prepare derivative works of,
   publicly display, publicly perform, sublicense, and distribute
   your contribution as part of the Chipzen SDK.

3. **You grant a patent license.** You grant Chipzen a perpetual,
   worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable
   patent license to make, have made, use, offer to sell, sell,
   import, and otherwise transfer the contribution.

4. **You represent that your employer has approved (if applicable).**
   If your employer has rights to intellectual property you create,
   you represent that you have received permission to make the
   contribution on their behalf, or that your employer has waived
   such rights.

5. **No warranty.** You provide your contribution "AS IS", without
   warranties or conditions of any kind, express or implied.

## How to sign

When you open your first pull request, the CLA Assistant bot will
post a comment with a signature line. Reply to that comment with the
exact phrase the bot asks for, including your full name and email.
That recorded reply is your signature.

You only need to sign once per GitHub account.

If your contribution is on behalf of an employer with a Corporate
CLA, contact `legal@chipzen.ai` instead of signing the individual CLA.
